classes.label: Academic Society
classes.description: An academic society or organization in which a person holds a part-time position.
evidence: 学术团体隶属或主管单位的名称

classes.label: Academic Position
classes.description: A part-time position or role held by a person within an academic society.
evidence: 本人在学术团体内兼任的职务

classes.label: Advanced Study
classes.description: A record of advanced study, training, or a course taken by a person.
evidence: 指实际学习的累计时间
主办和组织学习的单位名称

classes.label: Overseas Visit
classes.description: A record of a person's travel abroad for study, work, or other purposes.
evidence: 派遣本人出国（境）学习、工作的单位名称
批准出国（境）并签发审批文件的上级主管部门名称

classes.label: Assessment
classes.description: A record of an evaluation, examination, or appraisal of a person.
evidence: 组织、干部、人事部门组派的考察组对德、才、勤、绩诸方面的评价意见
业务考核的结论和评语

classes.label: Personnel Change
classes.description: A record of a change in a person's employment status, such as joining, transferring, or taking leave.
evidence: 来单位工作的实际报到年月
组织自行编号：组织内部调动后原院系所中心号

datatype_properties.label: Social Part-time Resignation Reason Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the reason of resignation from a social part-time position.

datatype_properties.label: Academic Society Name
datatype_properties.description: Name of the academic society.

datatype_properties.label: Academic Society Level Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the level of the academic society.

datatype_properties.label: Academic Society Supervising Unit
datatype_properties.description: Name of the unit to which the academic society is subordinate or supervised.
evidence: 学术团体隶属或主管单位的名称

datatype_properties.label: Academic Position Title
datatype_properties.description: Title of the part-time position held in the academic society.
evidence: 本人在学术团体内兼任的职务

datatype_properties.label: Academic Position Start Date
datatype_properties.description: Date when the part-time position was approved.

datatype_properties.label: Academic Position End Date
datatype_properties.description: Date when the part-time position ended.

datatype_properties.label: Academic Position Resignation Reason Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the reason of resignation from the academic position.

datatype_properties.label: Advanced Study Nature Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the nature of the advanced study.

datatype_properties.label: Learning Method Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the method of learning.

datatype_properties.label: Learning Start Year Month
datatype_properties.description: Start year and month of the learning period.

datatype_properties.label: Learning End Year Month
datatype_properties.description: End year and month of the learning period.

datatype_properties.label: Total Class Hours
datatype_properties.description: Cumulative hours of actual learning.
evidence: 指实际学习的累计时间

datatype_properties.label: Learning Content
datatype_properties.description: Content of the learning.

datatype_properties.label: Training Course Name
datatype_properties.description: Name of the training course.

datatype_properties.label: Organizing Unit
datatype_properties.description: Name of the unit that organizes and hosts the learning.
evidence: 主办和组织学习的单位名称

datatype_properties.label: Organizing Unit Nature Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the nature of the organizing unit.

datatype_properties.label: Study Unit
datatype_properties.description: The unit where the person is studying.

datatype_properties.label: Study Unit Category Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the category of the study unit.

datatype_properties.label: Advanced Study Result Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the result of the advanced study.

datatype_properties.label: Overseas Date
datatype_properties.description: Date of departure for the overseas visit.

datatype_properties.label: Overseas Purpose Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the purpose of the overseas visit.

datatype_properties.label: Overseas Country Code
datatype_properties.description: Three-letter country code for the destination.
evidence: 用三字母国别代码，如 CHN 中国

datatype_properties.label: Destination Unit English Name
datatype_properties.description: English name of the destination unit.

datatype_properties.label: Destination Unit Chinese Name
datatype_properties.description: Chinese name of the destination unit.

datatype_properties.label: Dispatching Unit
datatype_properties.description: Name of the unit that dispatched the person.
evidence: 派遣本人出国（境）学习、工作的单位名称

datatype_properties.label: Delegation Name
datatype_properties.description: Specific name of the dispatched delegation.
evidence: 出国（境）工作或学习派出团组的具体名称

datatype_properties.label: Overseas Funding Source Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the source of funding for the overseas visit.

datatype_properties.label: Approving Unit
datatype_properties.description: Name of the higher-level supervisory department that approved the visit and issued the approval document.
evidence: 批准出国（境）并签发审批文件的上级主管部门名称

datatype_properties.label: Approval Date
datatype_properties.description: Date when the approval document was issued.
evidence: 批准出国（境）并签发审批文件的具体日期

datatype_properties.label: Approval Document Number
datatype_properties.description: Number of the approval document issued by the approving unit.
evidence: 批准出国（境）学习工作的单位签发的批准文件编号

datatype_properties.label: Approved Duration Months
datatype_properties.description: Approved duration of stay abroad, in months.
evidence: 批准在国（境）外滞留的期限，单位：月

datatype_properties.label: Study Work Content
datatype_properties.description: Main content of the study or work abroad.
evidence: 出国（境）学习工作的主要内容

datatype_properties.label: Study Work Achievement
datatype_properties.description: Completion status and main achievements of the study or work abroad.
evidence: 出国（境）学习工作的完成情况和主要成绩

datatype_properties.label: Expected Return Date
datatype_properties.description: Expected date of return.

datatype_properties.label: Actual Return Date
datatype_properties.description: Actual date of return.

datatype_properties.label: Passport or Permit Number
datatype_properties.description: Passport number or permit number (e.g., for travel to Hong Kong and Macau).
evidence: 通行证即“往来港澳通行证”

datatype_properties.label: Document Validity Period
datatype_properties.description: Validity period of the passport or permit.

datatype_properties.label: Assessment Category Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the category of the assessment.

datatype_properties.label: Assessment Date
datatype_properties.description: Date of the assessment.
evidence: 组织、干部、人事部门组派的考察组进行考察（考核）的日期

datatype_properties.label: Assessment Opinion
datatype_properties.description: Evaluation opinion on various aspects such as morality, ability, diligence, and performance.
evidence: 组织、干部、人事部门组派的考察组对德、才、勤、绩诸方面的评价意见

datatype_properties.label: Assessment Result Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the result of the assessment.
evidence: 经考核委员会或考察小组审核后，由部门负责人确定的考核结论

datatype_properties.label: Assessment Organization and Assessors
datatype_properties.description: Name of the assessment group and names of assessors and the department head who determined the conclusion.
evidence: 组织、干部、人事部门组派的考察组名称及直接参与考核的考察组成员姓名，以及确定考察结论的部门负责人姓名

datatype_properties.label: Assessment Content
datatype_properties.description: Main content of the business assessment.

datatype_properties.label: Assessment Responsible Person ID
datatype_properties.description: ID of the person responsible for the business assessment.
evidence: 负责业务考核的人员工号

datatype_properties.label: Assessment Comment
datatype_properties.description: Conclusion and comments of the business assessment.
evidence: 业务考核的结论和评语

datatype_properties.label: Assessment Department
datatype_properties.description: Name of the department responsible for the assessment.

datatype_properties.label: Skill Test Year Month
datatype_properties.description: Year and month of participating in a job recruitment or technical level test.
evidence: 参加招工或技术级别考试的年月

datatype_properties.label: Skill Test Trade Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the trade of the skill test.

datatype_properties.label: Skill Test Department
datatype_properties.description: Department in charge of the test.

datatype_properties.label: Technical Level
datatype_properties.description: Technical level applied for in the test.

datatype_properties.label: Skill Test Certificate Number
datatype_properties.description: Certificate number obtained from the skill test.
evidence: 考工考技获得的证书号

datatype_properties.label: Skill Test Comment
datatype_properties.description: Comments from the skill test.

datatype_properties.label: Skill Test Score
datatype_properties.description: Score or grade achieved in the skill test.

datatype_properties.label: Arrival Date at Unit
datatype_properties.description: Actual date of reporting for work at the unit, as recorded by the personnel department.
evidence: 来单位工作的实际报到年月，以人事部门记载为准

datatype_properties.label: Source Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the source of the person.
evidence: 中小学、中职和幼儿园采用JZGLY 教职工来源代码，高校采用GXJZGLY 高校教职工来源代码

datatype_properties.label: Source Region Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the source region.

datatype_properties.label: Reason for Joining Unit
datatype_properties.description: Reason for joining the unit.

datatype_properties.label: Previous Unit Name
datatype_properties.description: Name of the previous unit.

datatype_properties.label: Previous Party-Government Position Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the previous party or government position.

datatype_properties.label: Previous Technical Position Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the previous technical position.
evidence: 空白为未任任何专业技术职务

datatype_properties.label: Previous Discipline Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the previously engaged discipline.

datatype_properties.label: Previous Total Salary
datatype_properties.description: Previous total salary.

datatype_properties.label: Previous Teaching/Nursing Allowance
datatype_properties.description: Previous teaching or nursing allowance.

datatype_properties.label: Department Transfer Date
datatype_properties.description: Date of the department transfer.

datatype_properties.label: Department Transfer Reason
datatype_properties.description: Reason for the department transfer.

datatype_properties.label: Transfer Out Department ID
datatype_properties.description: ID of the department the person transferred out of within the organization.
evidence: 组织自行编号：组织内部调动后原院系所中心号

datatype_properties.label: Transfer In Department ID
datatype_properties.description: ID of the department the person transferred into within the organization.
evidence: 组织自行编号：组织内部调动后现院系所中心号

datatype_properties.label: Salary Transfer Date
datatype_properties.description: Date of the personal salary and labor transfer.

datatype_properties.label: Document File Number
datatype_properties.description: File number of documents related to the personal change.
evidence: 跟个人变动有关的文件档案编号

datatype_properties.label: Leave Date
datatype_properties.description: Date of leaving the post.

datatype_properties.label: Leave Reason Code
datatype_properties.description: Code for the reason of leaving the post.

datatype_properties.label: Return to Post Date
datatype_properties.description: Date of returning to the post.

datatype_properties.label: Sick Leave Start Date
datatype_properties.description: Start date of sick leave.

datatype_properties.label: Sick Leave Diagnosing Hospital
datatype_properties.description: Name of the hospital that diagnosed the sick leave.

datatype_properties.label: Sick Leave Diagnosis Certificate
datatype_properties.description: Sick leave diagnosis certificate issued by the hospital.
evidence: 医院开据的病休诊断证明

datatype_properties.label: Sick Leave Recovery Date
datatype_properties.description: Date of recovery and return to work from sick leave.

object_properties.label: holds Academic Position
object_properties.description: Associates an academic society with the positions held within it.
evidence: 本人在学术团体内兼任的职务

object_properties.label: has Assessment Record
object_properties.description: Associates a personnel change record with an assessment record.

relations.subject: AcademicSociety
evidence: 本人在学术团体内兼任的职务
